item.title: Silent catch blocks in operate/ swallow errors with no logging
item.intent: No error in the operate/ module is silently discarded. Every catch block either logs the error or re-throws it. Diagnostic failures are always observable.
item.description: 20+ catch blocks across the operate/ module swallow errors silently. Key locations: src/operate/doctor/checks.ts (14 instances at lines 84,145,248,257,297,339,378,407,480,496,560,568,595,640), src/operate/monitor/alerts.ts (lines 64,213,224,282,319), src/operate/status/status.ts (lines 131,164,216). Critically, silent catches in doctor/checks.ts mean diagnostic failures are invisible — a check that fails to run is indistinguishable from a check that passes. Steps: (1) search operate/ for 'catch {' and 'catch (_' patterns; (2) for each non-fatal catch, add console.warn() or structured log call with the error and context; (3) do NOT convert non-fatal catches to throws — keep fallback behaviour, just add logging. Scope: ~22 one-line additions across operate/.
